title: Register Complaint
streamlineWorkflow: Streamline case registration and investigation workflows.
description_full: CaseCraftAI helps investigators intake complaints quickly, organize evidence, and monitor urgent cases from one dashboard.

wizard.title: Complaint Register
wizard.heading: Register a New Complaint
wizard.description: Follow the guided steps below to capture evidence, complainant information and case notes.
wizard.tip: Tip: Use the quick buttons to jump directly to any section.
wizard.successDescription: The complaint has been saved to the registry and is ready for review by the assigned officer.
wizard.submitFailed: Submission failed. Please verify the backend is running.

navigation.tip: Tip: Use the quick buttons to jump to the relevant section instantly.

documentsEvidence.label: Documents & Evidence
documentsEvidence.heading: Upload Supporting Documents
documentsEvidence.description: Upload all documents, photos, videos, audio files, and other evidence related to this complaint. All file types are supported.
documentsEvidence.supportedFormats: Supported formats: PDF, Images, Audio, Video, Word, Excel, Text
documentsEvidence.selectAtLeast: Please select at least one file to upload.
documentsEvidence.uploadError: Error uploading documents. Please try again.
documentsEvidence.secureClouds: All documents are securely uploaded to Cloudinary and linked to this complaint for easy access and management.
